name: Alabama
memory: Picked this up at the Huntsville TJ on a road trip stop. The instant I saw the Muscle Shoals back panel I had to. Read every side of it in the parking lot before driving off — Saturn V on one side, banana pudding recipe on the other, fried pickle reference underneath. A whole road trip across one bag.

name: Arizona
memory: Grabbed at the Tempe TJ on the way home from the airport. Didn't even unpack the groceries before flipping the bag over to read all four panels.

name: Colorado
memory: Boulder TJ on a snowy Sunday. The mountain illustration on the back made me audibly say 'oh come on' in the checkout line. The cashier just smiled — apparently that happens a lot.

name: Citrus Jute Bag
memory: Deleting template photos to see if the renaming will work.

name: Pickle Cotton Bag
memory: A pickle. On a bag. It's not deep — I just liked it.

name: Arizona
memory: testing from mobile to see if mobile upload works!

name: Kentucky
memory: testing from safari on iOS number two

name: Flower Shop
memory: testing to see if uploading a new pantry post will work & trigger github actions.
